ग्रामीण जिलों के उन कोडों की पहचान करें जहां कम से कम एक घर है जो कुल मिलाकर मासिक 500 रुपये से कम खर्च करता है, साथ ही कम से कम एक घर है जिसका गैर-खाद्य मासिक व्यय 2,000 रुपये से अधिक है, जिला कोड के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध किया गया।
gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS < 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 AND MAX(T1.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) > 2000 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.district_code
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy g
JOIN fact_household_consumption c ON g.geography_id = c.geography_id
WHERE g.census_2001_urban_rural ILIKE 'Rural'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_household_consumption c1
    WHERE c1.geography_id = g.geography_id
      AND c1.monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs < 500
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_household_consumption c2
    WHERE c2.geography_id = g.geography_id
      AND c2.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs > 2000
  )
ORDER BY g.district_code;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT g.district_code
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy g
JOIN fact_household_consumption c ON g.geography_id = c.geography_id
WHERE g.census_2001_urban_rural ILIKE 'Rural'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_household_consumption c1
    WHERE c1.geography_id = g.geography_id
      AND c1.monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs < 500
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_household_consumption c2
    WHERE c2.geography_id = g.geography_id
      AND c2.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs > 2000
  )
ORDER BY g.district_code;

question: मुस्लिम परिवारों की पहचान करें जिन्होंने चावल की खपत पर शून्य व्यय दर्ज किया है, उनके घरेलू आईडी के आरोही क्रम में सूचीबद्ध किया गया है।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN FACT_FOOD_CONSUMPTION AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Muslim' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(T3.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS) = 0 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT HOUSEHOLD_ID
FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL
WHERE CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY ILIKE 'Muslim'
INTERSECT
SELECT HOUSEHOLD_ID
FROM FACT_FOOD_CONSUMPTION
WHERE CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS = 0
ORDER BY HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT HOUSEHOLD_ID
FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL
WHERE CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY ILIKE 'Muslim'

कौन सी जाति और धार्मिक समूह चावल, गेहूं और दालों के लिए औसतन 50 रुपये से अधिक खर्च करते हैं? इन समूहों और उनके औसत व्यय को अवरोही क्रम में सूचीबद्ध करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, AVG(T3.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID INNER JOIN FACT_FOOD_CONSUMPTION AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY HAVING AVG(T3.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS) > 50 ORDER BY AVG(T3.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    dhs.caste_religion_group_8_category,
    AVG(ffc.consumption_rice_expenditure_rs) AS avg_rice_expenditure,
    AVG(ffc.consumption_wheat_expenditure_rs) AS avg_wheat_expenditure,
    AVG(ffc.consumption_pulses_expenditure_rs) AS avg_pulses_expenditure
FROM dim_household_social dhs
JOIN fact_food_consumption ffc ON dhs.household_id = ffc.household_id
GROUP BY dhs.caste_religion_group_8_category
HAVING
    AVG(ffc.consumption_rice_expenditure_rs) > 50
    AND AVG(ffc.consumption_wheat_expenditure_rs) > 50
    AND AVG(ffc.consumption_pulses_expenditure_rs) > 50
ORDER BY
    (AVG(ffc.consumption_rice_expenditure_rs) + AVG(ffc.consumption_wheat_expenditure_rs) + AVG(ffc.consumption_pulses_expenditure_rs)) DESC;
raw_output:

    dhs.caste_religion_group_8_category,

question: कुल चावल और दालों पर व्यय का विवरण विभिन्न सामाजिक समूहों और संपत्ति स्तरों के लिए प्रदान करें, जाति श्रेणी और उच्चतम चावल व्यय के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध किया गया हो।

SELECT
    hs.caste_religion_group_8_category,

    SUM(fc.consumption_rice_expenditure_rs) AS total_rice_expenditure,

JOIN fact_food_consumption fc ON hs.household_id = fc.household_id

question:

उन शीर्ष 10 परिवारों की पहचान करें जिन्होंने मुख्य खाद्य पदार्थों—विशेष रूप से चावल, गेहूं और दालों—पर सबसे अधिक कुल खर्च किया है, जहां संयुक्त व्यय 50 रुपये से अधिक है, साथ ही उनकी सामाजिक श्रेणी का विवरण भी शामिल है।

question:
यह क्वेरी अनुवाद करें:
उत्तर प्रदेश के शीर्ष 10 ग्रामीण पड़ोस प्रदान करें जिनकी औसत मासिक प्रति व्यक्ति खपत सबसे अधिक है, यह दर्शाते हुए कि क्या प्रत्येक के पास एक ग्राम स्वास्थ्य सुविधा है।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.PSU_VILLAGE_OR_NEIGHBORHOOD_CODE, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), T3.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_VILLAGE_INFRASTRUCTURE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Uttar Pradesh' AND T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.PSU_VILLAGE_OR_NEIGHBORHOOD_CODE, T3.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR ORDER BY AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    dgh.psu_village_or_neighborhood_code,
    dgh.state,
    dgh.census_2001_urban_rural,
    AVG(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita,
    CASE
        WHEN dvi.village_health_facility_available_indicator = 1 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS has_village_health_facility
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_household_consumption fhc ON dgh.geography_id = fhc.geography_id
LEFT JOIN dim_village_infrastructure dvi ON dgh.geography_id = dvi.geography_id
WHERE dgh.state ILIKE 'Uttar Pradesh'
    AND dgh.census_2001_urban_rural ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY dgh.psu_village_or_neighborhood_code, dgh.state, dgh.census_2001_urban_rural, dvi.village_health_facility_available_indicator
ORDER BY avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT
    dgh.psu_village_or_neighborhood_code,
    dgh.state,
    dgh.census_2001_urban_rural,
    AVG(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita,
    CASE
        WHEN dvi.village_health_facility_available_indicator = 1 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS has_village_health_facility
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_household_consumption fhc ON dgh.geography_id = fhc.geography_id
LEFT JOIN dim_village_infrastructure dvi ON dgh.geography_id = dvi.geography_id
